items.title: What happened to Simone Biles? Olympic gymnastics star reveals she ‘almost died’
items.summary: Simone Biles shared a photo from hospital and described the incident as one of the scariest experiences of her life.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Persistent rain in Kingston washes out second ODI between West Indies and Sri Lanka
items.summary: The coin flip was the only action possible, leaving West Indies still 0-1 behind against Sri Lanka with one more game to go
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: This was a training game - England & Tuchel now need to get serious
items.summary: England have one more game to prepare for their World Cup campaign - and they must use it wisely, writes Phil McNulty.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
